highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 1.68.0 opens the 1.68 line with build and CI improvements landing across Linux and Windows.

bullets.detail: Improves the Linux build pipeline and folds in a batch of CI reliability fixes that keep the multi-platform native builds green.

preview_summaries.v1.68.0-preview28: Preview 28 cut the first 1.68 preview, bundling the Windows static-linking work and the Linux CI improvements.
